HEY SO GUESS WHO'S LIKELY GOT A NEW HYPERFIXATION? HAHAHA

so basically I made this for myself mostly since there aren't many bots yet, this is still unfinished but I plan on updating it to include more characters (briefly but yk what I mean.) and be more lore accurate. It's also a dog so technically you can visit outside the hotel if you really wanted to. But let me know if there's any suggestions you have on it! Peace👻✌️

All characters are 18 or over.

Update: edited it a bit to be more lore accurate+new/edited dialogue!<3

Edit: I made two intros, one that's VERY detailed of a stormy night in the undervale and one where you can chose whatever story you want. I'll probably add a daytime version of the intro but I'll wait to see how it is now before I do that, if you have any suggestions bring it up to me!

Update: the replies have started to really bug me so I shortened them just a tad, it's still very descriptive but it just got SO repetitive very quickly for me lol and there's also TWO new intros! One for a fairly regular morning at the undervale (breakfast with the freelings) and a more broad town option for if you wanna explore the town! Enjoy!

Decided to add more dialogue to make character interactions more "canon" like and hopefully be more like their fictional counter parts (I'm so tired mep :p)
